free_text:
Schedule A grid form. The only entries printed in the grid are the standard greyed-out **example rows** (ignored per spec): "Mega Corp. Stock" (SP; value $15,001-$50,000; DIVIDENDS; amount $1,001-$2,500; transaction S(part)), "Simon & Schuster" (value $1,001-$15,000 / "Indefinite"; Other income = Royalties; amount $201-$1,000), and "ABC Hedge Fund" (EIF checked; value $250,001-$500,000; Other income = Partnership Income; amount $1,001-$2,500).

The filer's actual data is not entered in the grid — the form states **"Please see the attached"**, pointing to the attached transaction table on the following pages.
